notes: Historical only; RHCK follows RHEL 6 class while UEK can be newer.
User-space ABI is EL7-class; UEK choice is separate.
Oracle documents RHCK and UEK availability separately from user-space ABI.
User-space compatibility is independent of kernel choice.
Oracle Linux 10 ships UEK by default on x86_64 plus RHCK; both are 6.12 class.
